Row.Text: A Library Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Library , adding more [ICON_RESEARCH] science and [ICON_CULTURE] culture to your city. A Library must be in the city before a Library Upgrade.
A Library Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Library , adding more [ICON_RESEARCH] science and [ICON_CULTURE] culture to your city. A Library must be in the city before a Library Upgrade.
A Library Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Library , adding more [ICON_RESEARCH] science and [ICON_CULTURE] culture to your city. A Library must be in the city before a Library Upgrade.
